description: Part of a letter with holiday greetings; writer describes his illness and explains that he is spending the holiday in the house of his brother’s father (probably his stepfather) to get some rest; citing Genesis 15:13 and Job 2:10. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
